subject: Not receiving system notification emails
description: Haven't received any system notification emails since last week, including approval notices and alert emails. Already checked the spam folder and confirmed they're not being intercepted.
title: Not receiving system notification emails

subject: Data report delayed updates
description: Reports on the data dashboard are frequently delayed, sometimes by over half a day, affecting business decisions. Previously the data was near real-time.
title: Data report delayed updates

subject: Report page showing blank
description: The report page shows blank with no data loading. It was working fine before; the problem started around March 21.
title: Report page showing blank

subject: Login speed has become slow
description: Login has been taking over 10 seconds recently, it used to load instantly. Multiple colleagues report the same issue across all browsers.
title: Login speed has become slow

subject: Mobile push notification anomaly
description: Not receiving message push notifications on the mobile app anymore. Used to get push reminders for pending approvals.
title: Mobile push notification anomaly

subject: Request to increase storage space
description: Department file storage space is nearly full, current utilization at 95%. Requesting expansion to 2TB.
title: Request to increase storage space
